the breaking down and decay of the
tissues of the appendix—a gangrenous condition.
The affliction of Jupiter in Pisces or Saturn in Virgo or
Pisces or Rahu in Scorpio or Mars in Gemini or Virgo, the
affliction happening to occur in the 5th or 6th house is
likely to bring about appendicitis. It will be seen that the 6th
house is not only the general seat of disease but has special
governance over the abdomen. Hence a malefic

278 How to Judge a Horoscope
of the type of Rahu or Mars is decidedly unfavourable
especially if the sign happens to be Virgo and the Moon is
also there. Summing up our observations, we can say that
the following combinations show a predisposition to
appendicitis:—
(a) Affliction of the 22nd drekkana particularly by
Rahu or Mars.
(b) The sixth house being subjected to powerful
Papakarthari Yoga.
(c) The Moon being posited in Virgo, Scorpio,
Aquarius and subject to malefic influences.
(d) The Sun in Leo or Aquarius receiving the aspect of
